SpaceXAI has released Grok 4.5, which Elon Musk described as 'an Opus-class model, but faster, more token-efficient and lower cost', priced at $2 per million input tokens and $6 per million output tokens.

Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh named members of five policy task forces including venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, former Bank of England Governor Mervin King, and former Walmart CEO Doug McMillon, to examine Fed operations spanning inflation, AI, communications, and productivity.

After two days of intense strikes, fighting between the US and Iran appears to have paused, with the US saying it hit 170 targets in Iran and Iran saying it targeted US military bases in the Gulf, while Israeli armed forces chief Eyal Zamir said Israel is prepared if fighting resumes.

US and Iran exchanged intensifying fire on Thursday with sirens sounding at least three times in Bahrain, home to the US Navy's 5th Fleet, and missiles targeting Kuwait and Qatar; Iran's Health Ministry said two days of American airstrikes killed at least 14 people and wounded another 78.

OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager in San Francisco to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, as Sensor Tower estimates the share of ChatGPT users aged 35 and older globally rose to 31% in Q2 from 26% a year earlier.

Aldi is pursuing a $9bn US expansion plan to add 800 new stores over five years, targeting dense urban hubs like Manhattan, where the German discounter currently holds just 2.9% of the US grocery market compared to Walmart's roughly 20%.

A woman's body was recovered from the Falls of Falloch near Crianlarich after emergency services - including water rescue units from Oban and Stirling - were called to the 30ft waterfall at about 22:45 on Friday; police said her death was not suspicious.
